message:
fix(ad): correct Cholesky VJP diagonal factor and back-substitution direction

Fix two bugs in the Cholesky backward pass:
1. The Φ operator was missing the 1/2 diagonal factor from Murray 2016
   (accounting for L appearing in both L and L^T of A = LL^T). Add
   explicit diagonal halving after tril(L^T @ G).
2. The X @ L^{-1} computation used forward substitution with L instead
   of back-substitution with L^T. Fix to iterate in reverse and use
   L^T entries.

Un-ignore the cholesky_vjp_numerical_2x2 test and fix its numerical
gradient: off-diagonal perturbations affect both A[i,j] and A[j,i]
in the symmetric matrix, so divide by 2 to get the per-element gradient.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
